title: petunia × atkinsiana
intro: Petunia × atkinsiana, also known as the sweet-scented petunia or sweet william, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nightshade family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Petunia × atkinsiana include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
